title: FDA Rejects Replimune's Melanoma Drug RP1 for Second Time
headline: FDA issues second complete response letter for Replimune's oncolytic immunotherapy RP1 in advanced melanoma, maintaining objections to single-arm trial design.
key_facts: CRL issued April 10, 2026; first rejection July 2025; Replimune stock fell nearly 20%; FDA objection: single-arm trial insufficient for approval

title: Sun Pharma's $12 Billion All-Cash Bid for Organon
headline: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries submits binding all-cash proposal valued at $12 billion for Organon & Co., the largest overseas acquisition by an Indian pharma company.
key_facts: $12 billion all-cash bid; Organon shares rose 41% to $8.25 on Friday; financing from JPMorgan, MUFG, Standard Chartered, Citi; three months due diligence completed

title: Amgen's Subcutaneous TEPEZZA Meets Phase 3 Endpoints
headline: Amgen's Phase 3 trial of subcutaneous TEPEZZA via on-body injector meets primary and all key secondary endpoints in moderate-to-severe active thyroid eye disease with 77% proptosis response rate.
key_facts: Announced April 6, 2026; primary endpoint: 77% proptosis response (76.7% TEPEZZA OBI vs. 19.6% placebo, p<0.0001); mean proptosis reduction -3.17 mm vs. -0.80 mm placebo (p<0.0001); 25,000+ patients treated worldwide; 24-week trial period

title: Neurocrine Acquires Soleno Therapeutics
headline: Neurocrine Biosciences acquires Soleno Therapeutics to expand endocrinology and rare disease portfolio including DCCR for Prader-Willi syndrome.
key_facts: Announced April 6, 2026; deal terms not disclosed

title: Gilead Acquires Tubulis and Announces Diversification Strategy
headline: Gilead Sciences acquires privately-held German biotech Tubulis, an ADC developer, as part of diversification strategy through recent cancer and autoimmune disease acquisitions.
key_facts: Announced April 7, 2026; Tubulis develops next-generation antibody-drug conjugates; deal terms not disclosed; part of broader portfolio diversification

title: Invivyd Advances Measles Monoclonal Antibody VMS063
headline: Invivyd announces discovery and advancement of VMS063, a potentially first-and-best-in-class measles monoclonal antibody for treatment and prevention.
key_facts: Announced April 9, 2026; VMS063 discovered using Invivyd proprietary platform; also reported progress in REVOLUTION clinical program for COVID-19 prevention mAb VYD2311

title: Novartis Cuts 114 Jobs at New Jersey Headquarters
headline: Novartis plans to eliminate 114 positions at East Hanover, NJ headquarters between June and November 2026 as part of rare-disease sales force restructuring.
key_facts: 114 positions cut June 26–November 27, 2026; follows prior 58 positions cut November 2025–June 2026; part of multiyear global restructuring for rare-disease sales reorganization

title: Eli Lilly Launches Oral GLP-1 Pill Foundayo
headline: Eli Lilly launches oral GLP-1 pill Foundayo, directly competing with Novo Nordisk's oral obesity medicine where Novo holds approximately three-month market lead.
key_facts: Brand name: Foundayo; Novo Nordisk has ~3-month head start in oral GLP-1 market

title: AACR 2026 Annual Meeting Begins Next Week
headline: AACR 2026 Annual Meeting (April 19–22) represents one of the year's most important oncology data catalysts with BioNTech presenting endometrial cancer data.
key_facts: Dates: April 19–22, 2026; BioNTech presenting endometrial cancer data

title: Pharma M&A Surge Continues Into Q2 2026
headline: Seven deals worth $1B+ announced in 12 days during March with 272 catalyst events tracked for Q2 including 17 PDUFA decisions and 52 Phase 3 readouts.
key_facts: 7 deals worth $1B+ in 12 days during March; Q2 2026 tracking 272 catalyst events April–June; 17 PDUFA decisions; 52 Phase 3 readouts; 25 NDA/BLA filings

title: RFK Jr. Updates ACIP Charter with Vaccine Safety Emphasis
headline: HHS updates ACIP charter under RFK Jr. leadership with new emphasis on vaccine safety, raising alarm bells among public health experts.
key_facts: Announced April 10, 2026; updated ACIP charter reflects new vaccine safety focus
